features: Original Source: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100 Percent natural fragrances, we‚Äôre inspired by nature, from bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower
The Power of Nature: We‚Äôve wedged 20 real lemons and 100 Percent natural fragrance into every 500ml bottle of shower gel. Our lemons are sourced from Sicily and handpicked by farmers

100 Percent Vegan and Cruelty Free Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all products. Products are tested on us, never on animals. This fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature

description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a unique and zesty fragrance! Experience rapid refreshment with our Original Source Zesty Lemon & Tea Tree shower gel. We‚Äôve wedged 20 real lemons and 100% natural fragrance into every 500ml bottle. Our lemons are sourced from Sicily. Growing lemons has always been an important part of Sicilian agriculture - 80% of all Italian production of lemons originate from the island and this has been true since Roman times! The lemons are handpicked by farmers and cold pressed to extract the 100% natural fragrance that goes straight into our shower gel. Our products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we‚Äôre proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100% renewable energy and our bottles are 100% recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature! Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Citrus Medica Limonum (Lemon) Peel Oil, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Citrus Sinensis (Orange) Peel Oil Expressed, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia (Bergamot) Fruit Oil, Polyquaternium-7, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, C11-15 Pareth-7, C11-15 Pareth-40, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Citral, Citronellol, Limonene, CI 19140, CI 14700.
